Join the Community Living North Halton family!
Our video below shares what it is like to be a part of our organization!

 

 

 

 

 

Why You Should Join Our Team: 
Community  Living North Halton offers stellar training and development opportunities! Below are just a few of the many reasons why you should join our team today!
You will have the opportunity to make a difference in the North Halton community and enrich individual lives while being a part of a dynamic team
Our reimbursement & sponsorship opportunities for the Developmental Service Worker Apprenticeship Program encourage employees growth
We offer Employee & Family Assistance Programs, Student Placements that lead to employment & career development for new graduates!
Halton Region jobs are conveniently located and accessible
